name: disha-cap-guidance
description: Disha — Multilingual CAP (Maharashtra) guidance & counselling platform with KB-grounded AI chat + voice.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
